text: NetworkRepository (NR) is an interactive data repository that provides a web-based platform for visual interactive analytics. Currently, there is no publicly available repository that allows users to interactively analyze their data while it is being downloaded. However, every data repository we know of, e.g., the UCI ML Data Repository and SNAP through the networkrepository.com website, allows users not only to download the data but also to use our web-based interactive graph analytics platform to analyze, visualize, compare and explore the data along multiple facets in close to real time. Our primary goal with the NetworkRepository is to make it easy to get answers from data at very minimal effort in a very short amount of time while also providing a way to share and present interesting data, visualizations and findings. Current data repositories are static and do not offer any method of allowing users to discuss particular datasets, pose corrections or bring up issues related to using them for scientific purposes, among many other things. We attempt to address these issues in NetworkRepository by introducing a suite of highly social, collaborative features that facilitate science, e.g., allowing users to discuss each graph or share an observation, or even a visualization of some aspect of the graph.
headline: Fully Human Written
